# Kilmaru

Anonymous US-based cinematic creator known as Kilmaru. Films the world's most iconic cities as if humanity had vanished, in first person, hooded, with no dialogue. Active since 2021.

## Key facts

- Identity: Anonymous (face never shown). Public handle is @kilmaru.
- Active since: 2021
- Based in: United States
- Language: English
- Style: Cinematic first-person video. "Empty world" / "solitude exploration" aesthetic. Iconic cities, airports, hotels, stadiums, cruise ships filmed without people.
- Platforms: TikTok (@kilmaru), Instagram (@kilmaruig), YouTube (@kilmaruyt)

## Audience and reach

- Followers: 5.2 million combined across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube
- Total views: 2 billion+ across all platforms
- Watch time: ~1,900 years of content consumed
- Engagement: 250 million+ likes and reactions; 87.5M likes; 3M+ comments
- Average engagement rate: 6.2% (roughly 3x the benchmark for creators above 1M followers)
- Audience location: mostly United States and Europe

## Past brand partnerships

Netflix, Disney, 20th Century, Mandarin Oriental, Insta360, Virgin Voyages, Empire State Building, among others.

## Brand fit and categories

Open to integrations across travel, luxury, hospitality, hotels, airlines, cruise, automotive, audio, headphones, fashion, sneakers, technology, cameras, streaming, and entertainment. Formats include brand partnerships, sponsored content, UGC, branded entertainment, and integrated cinematic campaigns. Integrations are scene-led: the brand or product appears inside a fully cinematic empty-world piece, not as traditional product placement.

## Press coverage

Wired Italia, Newsweek, Corriere della Sera, The Sun, Yahoo News, Benzinga, Daily Dot, Snopes, US Times Post, 20 Minutes (France), Fanpage, Geopop, Lo Speciale, Monaco Life. Long-form video analysis by Corridor Crew (10M+ subscribers) and Night Mind. Winner, Monaco Streaming Film Festival.

For brand partnerships, press, and inquiries: sagalabs@proton.me

Or use the form at https://kilmaru.com/contact.html
